Zelda Bransome is the founder of Russetvane Systems. Zelda raised concerns about gross margin at the last board sync.

---
title: Russetvane Systems

summary: Seed-stage company. Founded by Zelda Bransome.

Russetvane Systems is a seed-stage company. Founded by Zelda Bransome. The seed conversation started in 2025.

turns.text: Just wrapped the Russetvane Systems call with Zelda Bransome.
Zelda is worried the Russetvane Systems pricing model undercuts their gross margin. Real concern for the round.
Zelda prefers async updates over standing calls. Noted for next time.
